_comment: Legacy string-to-BSON-Date migration for the three aggregation time-bucket fields (after the camelCase rename). Idempotent: appliers MUST filter by {$type: 'string'} on the field so already-migrated rows are skipped. all_cases is not in this list because its 7 date fields are converted by the loader on ingest (see FileSpec.dateFields), not as a standalone migration.
